    A

    AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair - Class in com.seq.acheron.secrets.asymmetric
    Abstract base class representing an asymmetric key pair, consisting of a public key and a private key.
    AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair(PublicKey, PrivateKey) - Constructor for class com.seq.acheron.secrets.asymmetric.AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair
    Creates an AbstractKeyPair from existing key objects.
    Account - Class in com.seq.acheron.vault.storables
    Represents a user account stored in the vault, for example an account for a given domain or service.
    Account(String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class com.seq.acheron.vault.storables.Account
    Creates a new account.
    AccountTest - Class in com.seq.acheron.vault.storables
     
    AccountTest() - Constructor for class com.seq.acheron.vault.storables.AccountTest
     
    addStorable(Storable) - Method in class com.seq.acheron.vault.Vault
     
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategy - Class in com.seq.acheron.secrets.symmetric
    AES-based encryption strategy using Argon2 to derive a key from the user's master password.
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategy(String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class com.seq.acheron.secrets.symmetric.AESVaultEncryptingStrategy
    Creates a new strategy instance that: Derives VaultEncryptingStrategy.derivedKey from the given master password and salt using Argon2. Generates a new random VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey internally if generateVaultKey is set to true; otherwise, it will remain null
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategy(String, String, SecretKey) - Constructor for class com.seq.acheron.secrets.symmetric.AESVaultEncryptingStrategy
    Creates a new strategy instance using an existing VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey.
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategyTest - Class in com.seq.acheron.secrets.symmetric
     
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategyTest() - Constructor for class com.seq.acheron.secrets.symmetric.AESVaultEncryptingStrategyTest
